title: Bedwars Items
description: Added bedwars items to the gane, trough new recipes and changes to vanilla items!
body:
# Core **A bedwars themed plugin, wich adds 4 new unique crafting recipes and 2 reworks to previous vanila items!**
# Reworks * Made fireballs shoot ghast like projectiles with explosions instead of only acting like a one time use flint and steel.

* Made Tnts ignite instantly when placed, Without requiring any source to light it. # Crafting * A BedBug crafting recipe ( Shown in gallery ) Wich summons a silverFish renamed as a BedBug. It attacks anyone, even the person that spawned it. The item you craft appears as a silverfish spawn egg. * A Golem Protector crafting recipe ( Shown in gallery ) Wich summons a Iron Golem . It attacks only hostile mobs / other players, but does not attack the person that spawned it. The item you craft appears as a iron golem spawn egg * A Pop up Tower crafting recipe ( Shown in gallery ) Wich summons a tower like building, consisting of a 3x3x7 empty area with walls around it, a roof with a castle like outer upp wall, and also a ladder leading up to the top of the tower. This pop up tower is made out of stone, and doesnt build instantly. The item you craft appears as a chest. * A Bridge egg crafting recipe ( Shown in gallery ) Wichw when thrown, creates a bridge of dirt alongside its trajectory. The material for the bridge can be changed using the command /bedwarsitems:setblockforegg ( Block ) , but only as an operator. The item you craft appears as an egg. # Ussage ```/bedwarsitems (true/false)``` --- Makes available the abbility to craft most of these items, and you being able to use those items ( Note that if the command is off, you can still use the items if you crafted them, but they will work as the regular items in vanilla minecraft, like for example, the Golem Protector will attack the one that summoned it, The pop up tower will only act like a chest and so on. ) . **This command is set to false as deffault, and can only be executed by an operator** ```/bedwarsitems:setblockforegg (block)``` --- Makes the Bridge egg bridge be made out of any block you want. **Command can only be executed by an operator**
